description: A Webpack plugin that replaces calls to localization functions (i18n) with target texts, inlining and multiplying i18n assets for all locales in a single production build.
readme:
# 🌍 webpack-i18n-assets-plugin

A plugin for Webpack that replaces calls to localization functions (i18n) with target texts.

### Features

- Inlines i18n texts into the bundle (while substituting parameters into the final string)
- Generates assets for all locales in one build
- The plugin works only for production builds!
- Supports only literals as keys in the localization function argument (template strings and variables are not allowed)

exports.name: applyPluginToWebpackConfig
exports.description: Helper function that applies I18nAssetsPlugin to an existing Webpack configuration object. Returns the original config unchanged in development mode. In production mode, it modifies the output filenames to include [locale], removes any existing WebpackAssetsManifest plugin, adds I18nAssetsPlugin, and adds per-locale WebpackAssetsManifest plugins that generate assets-manifest.<locale>.json files.

parameters.name: originalConfig
parameters.description: The existing Webpack configuration object to modify

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Plugin options including the locales map and optional custom resolver/replacer functions

exports.name: Options
exports.description: Configuration options for I18nAssetsPlugin and applyPluginToWebpackConfig. By default the plugin works with @gravity-ui/i18n, but custom resolver/replacer functions can be provided for other i18n libraries. If any of importResolver, declarationResolver, or replacer is provided, all three must be provided together.

fields.name: locales
fields.description: Required map of locale names to locale data objects. Each key is a locale code (e.g. 'en', 'ru') and the value is the translation data for that locale.

fields.name: importResolver
fields.description: Custom function that processes import declarations and marks which imports should be treated as localization functions. Receives the import source, export name, identifier name, and module path. Return {resolved: true, keyset?: string} to mark the import as a localizer, or undefined to skip it. Must be provided together with declarationResolver and replacer if any custom function is used.

fields.name: declarationResolver
fields.description: Custom function that processes variable declarations and marks which variables should be treated as localization functions. Receives the VariableDeclarator AST node and module path. Return {functionName: string, keyset?: string} to mark the variable as a localizer, or undefined to skip. Must be provided together with importResolver and replacer if any custom function is used.

fields.name: replacer
fields.description: Custom function that processes localization function calls and returns the replacement string. Receives ReplacerArgs (callNode, callArguments, localeName, key, keyset) and is bound to a ReplacerContext with a resolveKey helper and the full localeData. Must be provided together with importResolver and declarationResolver if any custom function is used.

fields.name: collectUnusedKeys
fields.description: When true, enables unused key collection mode. After the build completes, generates an unused-keys.json file listing keys that were never referenced. Requires the replacer to always return the detailed {value, key, keyset} format. Defaults to false.
